content: [URGENT] Investigate the tenant isolation bug. Customers can view other users' designs. Root cause identification and fix are top priority.
summary: Urgent bug investigation request from Alex
Checked cache implementation for tenant ID

content:
⚠️ Investigating tenant isolation bug. Customer reports of viewing other users' designs.
Running grep -r 'setTenant\|setTeamId' to audit all locations.

summary: Added tenant ID to cache key

content:
[Report] Identified the root cause of the tenant isolation bug.

Root cause: Cache key in design-cache.ts was missing the tenant ID.
cache.get(designId) → cache.get(tenantId:designId)

PR #11 created, all tests pass.

Please have Nova notify affected customers. "We will deploy a hotfix today" is safe to communicate.

✅ Tenant isolation bug — root cause identified and fixed.
Cause: design-cache.ts cache key missing tenant ID
Fix: cache.get(designId) → cache.get(tenantId:designId)
PR #11 → Merged → Deployed

🔧 Tenant isolation bug fix complete.

Root cause: Cache key was missing tenant ID
Fix: `cache.get(designId)` → `cache.get(tenantId:designId)`
PR #11 merged → Hotfix deployed

Lessons recorded in knowledge/tenant-isolation-design.md.
